title: Libertas - Weekly Digests
description: Weekly summaries of freedom technology developments

items.title: Weekly Digest: 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-07
items.summary: This week highlighted the escalating tension between surveillance states and digital freedom advocates, with governments from Gabon to Russia demonstrating sophisticated censorship capabilities while researchers advance anonymous measurement systems. Four new project ideas emerged focusing on blackout-resistant communications and adaptive circumvention tools.
items.content_text: This week highlighted the escalating tension between surveillance states and digital freedom advocates, with governments from Gabon to Russia demonstrating sophisticated censorship capabilities while researchers advance anonymous measurement systems. Four new project ideas emerged focusing on blackout-resistant communications and adaptive circumvention tools.

items.title: Weekly Digest: 2026-01-15 to 2026-01-21
items.summary: Iran's complete internet blackout during deadly protests demonstrates the urgent need for censorship-resistant communication tools, while copyright law's structural incentives continue driving platform over-censorship. Meanwhile, nation-state blockchain adoption expands with Bhutan's validator operations.
items.content_text: Iran's complete internet blackout during deadly protests demonstrates the urgent need for censorship-resistant communication tools, while copyright law's structural incentives continue driving platform over-censorship.
